title: snacpac 4
description: Official modpack for the It's Better Together Server Season 4
body: This is a collection of vanilla-friendly quality of life mods that are supported on the It's Better Together Server. The current season is Season 4.   The mods include things like shaders, a minimap, performance improvements, mouse tweaks, presence footsteps, voice chat mod and more vanilla friendly mods. It's Better Together is a Minecraft server for adults only, if you are under the age of 18 you obviously can still use the mudpack but the age restriction on the server is never changing. Alternatively, if you are too young for the IBT server you can host your own! Here's a discount code you can use at checkout to help support me and also save you a few bucks while you're at it! [](https://bisecthosting.com/snaco) Cursforge Mods Included in this pack: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-third-person https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/malilib https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tweakeroo https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/veinminer-companion https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map
